info.description: The Department of Mathematics & Scientific Computing (MNC) focuses on advanced mathematical sciences, computational methods, and interdisciplinary research.
The department provides rigorous training in mathematics, statistics, and scientific computing, preparing students for careers in academia, data science, industry, and research.

programme.name: B.Sc. / B.Tech. (Maths & Computing)
programme.details: Undergraduate programme combining mathematics and computational techniques.

programme.name: M.Sc.
programme.details: Postgraduate programme in advanced mathematics and applications.

programme.name: Ph.D.
programme.details: Research leading to a doctoral degree in mathematics and scientific computing.
